rulings.Case Title: KATHLEEN CAPPETTI VS. RICARD DE NOLA AKA RICHARD DENOLA AKA RICHARD H et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 9, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT RICHARD DENOLA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Grant motion to strike as to moving party only. rulings.Case Title: KIMBERLY K.A. CHIN ET AL VS. SANDRA WONG ET AL

rulings.Case Title: JUAN MENA VS. CECILIO HERNANDEZ ET AL

rulings.Case Title: THELMA FAJARDO VS. MARILYN NUQUI ET AL

DEFENDANTs MARILYN NUQUI, RIZALDY NUQUI and KELCEY NUQUI's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to address the discrepancy between assertion in Notice that Triscilla Cael is the landlord demanding rent or possession and allegations in the Complaint that Thelma Fajardo is the owner entitled to possession. = (501/REQ)
